trait.1: a born leader — independent, original and driven to be first
trait.2: gentle, intuitive and cooperative — a peacemaker ruled by feeling
trait.3: wise, expressive and optimistic — a natural teacher and creator
trait.4: unconventional and systematic — a rule-bender who builds to last
trait.5: restless, clever and adaptable — a communicator who craves change
trait.6: loving, artistic and harmonious — devoted to home and beauty
trait.7: spiritual and introspective — a philosopher drawn to the unseen
trait.8: ambitious, resilient and karmic — a hard worker who plays the long game
trait.9: courageous, warm and determined — a fighter with a generous heart
